scope: Release APK adb reverse loss and explicit-refresh recovery on a real Android Emulator using ADB UIAutomator and disposable server-wide CCB projects.

mobile_app.head: 89274a0
mobile_app.commit: test: add release reverse recovery avd smoke

source.head: 7e436f7e
source.commit: fix: order mobile native transcript pages by record time

release_apk.build_warning: file_picker and mobile_scanner still use plugin-applied Kotlin Gradle Plugin; Flutter reports this as a future deprecation warning.

ui_smoke.automation: ADB UIAutomator XML plus adb input tap; no Flutter Driver.
ui_smoke.failure_action: Removed adb reverse, tapped Refresh conversation, and observed Connection refused in the selected-agent UI.
ui_smoke.recovery_action: Seeded a new provider-native agent reply while disconnected, restored adb reverse, tapped Refresh conversation, and observed the new recovery marker in the selected-agent UI.

acceptance_notes: The run started two disposable real /home/bfly/yunwei/test_ccb2 projects and a loopback-only server-wide gateway.
The release APK was seeded with the paired profile, installed, and launched without Flutter Driver.
ADB UIAutomator opened test_ccb2_alpha/mobile_probe from the real server-wide project list and tapped the requested agent chip.
After adb reverse was removed, an explicit Refresh conversation action showed a visible connection failure instead of silently spinning or mutating local state.

After adb reverse was restored, a second explicit Refresh conversation action fetched a newly seeded provider-native agent reply, proving the recovery path reached the backend instead of reusing stale UI content.
Device metrics after a 5-second post-recovery settle showed no app wake locks, no FATAL/ANR/OOM logcat marker, and no skipped-frame logcat marker.
residual_risks: This closes release-mode adb reverse loss and selected-agent explicit-refresh recovery for the real server-wide Android Emulator path.
Physical device and Tailnet/VPN recovery still need separate validation outside the local ADB reverse emulator path.
